channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Sunday, June 14
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 02:00 PM (2.46 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 10:48 PM (-0.465 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SW 12 G 18 mph
